translations.landing.pricing.cta.subtitle: Start with the free version or contact us for a personalized recommendation.
translations.landing.pricing.cta.title: Not sure which plan?
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your cloud plan at any time. For offline licenses, you can upgrade by paying the difference.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a2: Your workflows continue to work indefinitely. You only lose access to updates and support. Renew anytime to get the latest features.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a3: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. No questions asked.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a4: Absolutely! The open source core is MIT licensed. You can use it for any purpose, including commercial projects.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a5: Yes. Flyto2 runs entirely on your computer. Your data never leaves your machine, regardless of which plan you're on.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a6: The free plan has generous limits that reset every month. If you reach the limit, you can wait for the next month or upgrade to Pro for unlimited access.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a7: No. The free plan requires no credit card, no account, and no commitment. Just download and start automating.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a8: Desktop Pro runs on your computer — perfect for privacy and offline use. Cloud plans add team features like shared workflows and collaboration.

translations.landing.pricing.why.feature1Desc: Download and start using immediately. No sign-up, no credit card, no email verification needed.
translations.landing.pricing.why.feature2Desc: Everything runs on your computer. Your workflows, data, and results never leave your machine.
translations.landing.pricing.why.feature3Desc: The free plan never expires. Use it as long as you want. Upgrade only when you need more.
